topic: AI Workflow Automation Cost Comparison 2026: n8n vs Zapier vs Make at Scale

key_points: Zapier charges per task — each action in a workflow = 1 billable task
n8n charges per execution — entire workflow = 1 execution regardless of steps
Make charges per operation (similar to Zapier but significantly cheaper per unit)
Complex 10-step workflows cost 10x more on Zapier vs n8n
Self-hosted n8n on $50/mo server can replace $1,500+/mo Zapier spend
Zapier leads with 8,000+ integrations and simplest UX for non-technical users
n8n has ~400+ native integrations but any API-accessible service can be connected
Make.com has 3,000+ integrations, excels at visual conditional logic
n8n 2.0 (January 2026) ships native LangChain integration with ~70 AI nodes
Make.com AI builder Maia still flagged beta in early 2026
n8n is the only platform with true self-hosting and unlimited executions
Zapier Agents beta released early 2026 — describe outcome, AI stitches actions
n8n supports persistent memory across executions and vector DB RAG workflows
Enterprise pattern: n8n as core AI engine + Zapier for niche low-traffic apps
Make delivers visual workflow power at 60% lower cost than Zapier
Zapier fastest path for non-technical teams — no infrastructure management
n8n requires technical setup but offers JavaScript/Python code nodes
Zapier overage billing at 1.25x base task cost once limits exceeded
n8n Pro plan: $60/mo for 10,000 executions vs Zapier Team $69/mo for 2,000 tasks
Zapier AI Actions and natural language Zap creation launched 2025
Key agentic dimensions: memory, tool extensibility, recursion, human gates, data sovereignty
n8n is the only platform where AI agent architecture is supported natively in 2026
Zapier Agents: easy to start, harder to control or version for complex agent flows
n8n supports direct internal database connections without API intermediaries
Cost model matters for AI: reasoning steps multiply task counts fast on Zapier

stats.fact: n8n raised $180M Series C in October 2025, valuation surged from $300M to $2.5B in four months
stats.source: Sacra — n8n revenue, valuation and funding

stats.fact: n8n reached $40M ARR in July 2025 and serves 3,000+ enterprise customers
stats.source: Sacra — n8n revenue, valuation and funding

stats.fact: n8n has 230,000+ active users globally across free and paid tiers as of early 2026
stats.source: Flowlyn — n8n User Count: Figures, Growth and Demographics

stats.fact: n8n execution-based billing can reduce automation costs 80-90% vs Zapier for complex high-volume workflows
stats.source: Youstable — n8n vs Zapier: Real Cost Comparison for 2026

stats.fact: Organizations implementing workflow automation see 59% cost reduction on average; ROI ranges 30-200% in year one
Marketers using AI automation save 12.5 hours weekly (approximately 26 working days annually)
stats.source: Genesys Growth — Zapier AI vs Make AI vs n8n AI Guide 2026

stats.fact: Make.com delivers visual workflow power at 60% lower cost than Zapier
stats.source: Digital Applied — Zapier vs Make vs n8n 2026 Automation Comparison

stats.fact: Zapier overage billing kicks in at 1.25x base task cost once monthly plan limit exceeded
stats.source: Zapier Help — How pay-per-task billing works

stats.fact: n8n 2.0 launched January 2026 with native LangChain and approximately 70 dedicated AI nodes
stats.source: n8n Blog — Best AI Workflow Automation Tools 2026

angles: The billing model trap: how Zapier task-based pricing becomes a tax on AI reasoning steps (each LLM call = multiple tasks)
The 80-90% cost reduction case: real math comparing a 10-step workflow at 10,000 runs/month across all three platforms
AI-native vs AI-bolted-on: n8n LangChain nodes vs Zapier Agents beta vs Make Maia — which actually supports agentic workflows
Self-hosted n8n as a cost escape hatch: $50/mo VPS vs $1,500+/mo Zapier for high-volume teams
Data sovereignty angle: regulated industries (healthcare, finance, legal) choosing self-hosted n8n for compliance
Enterprise migration playbook: companies moving Zapier workflows to n8n/Make and the hidden migration costs
The hybrid architecture: n8n for AI-heavy high-volume core + Zapier for long-tail niche integrations
